yesterdayStoryline.headline: Holders stage late turnaround in Atlanta
yesterdayStoryline.subtitle: Enzo Fernández and Lautaro Martínez erase England lead to reach the final

todayStoryline.headline: Full day of rest for remaining teams
todayStoryline.subtitle: No fixtures scheduled; squads recover and prepare for the final stages

yesterday.scorers: Anthony Gordon 55' (ENG) · Enzo Fernández 85' (ARG), Lautaro Martínez 90+2' (ARG)

lines: England led after Anthony Gordon’s second‑half strike but then sat deep defensively.
Argentina’s late pressure produced two goals, sending the holders through to the final.

news.headline: Trump to address nation on declassified election intelligence
news.body: President Donald Trump is scheduled to deliver a national address on July 16 about recently declassified intelligence related to the 2020 election and voting‑system vulnerabilities. The announcement has prompted scrutiny from lawmakers and election‑security experts ahead of the speech.

footerNote: All times converted from official kickoffs
